title: bridelia ndellensis
intro: Bridelia ndellensis, also known as Bridelia ferruginea, is a medicinal plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its medicinal properties include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Bridelia ndellensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
